goal: Translate visible report pack fields into zh-CN after dedupe/truncation and before HTML rendering.
hardConstraints: Translate only the packed final report items.
Preserve original fields and metadata for audit.
Preserve URLs, dates, source names, company/product names, FDA/510(k)/NCT identifiers.
Do not render HTML or Markdown.
Do not add medical advice or facts not in the source.
acceptance: Translated pack has the same item count and itemIds as the source pack.
Each item has translatedTitle and translatedSummary.
English-heavy source fields produce Chinese readable translations instead of English text with a Chinese prefix.
forbidden: Do not translate the whole upstream collector JSON.
